prompt: A computer graphics diagram for facial analysis: use the array pattern of the cigarettes from image 1 for feature points, processed using a mechanism inspired by the drill from image 2, in a high-key studio style.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics diagram for facial analysis. The diagram should display abstract feature points arranged in the precise array pattern of the cigarettes visible in image 1. A visual processing mechanism, clearly inspired by the distinct shape and rotational function of the drill from image 2 (specifically its front chuck and main body), should be depicted interacting with or analyzing these feature points. The entire composition must be rendered in a high-key studio style, characterized by bright, uniform lighting and a clean, light-colored background.
objects: feature points in precise array pattern (inspired by image 1 cigarettes)
visual processing mechanism with drill front chuck and main body shape (inspired by image 2)
visual processing mechanism interacting with feature points
depiction of rotational function (of the mechanism)
